2021 / archived / updated May 30, 2023

OMBAG

Multi-objective design-space exploration for balancing characteristics of GCC-compiled binary files.

#python#gcc#binary-analysis#optimization

OMBAG explores the multi-objective design space for balancing characteristics of binary files produced by GCC compilation.

The repository is archived, but it remains a useful historical project because it connects compilation, binary properties, and optimization.

source
